commands: Expand the analysis of overfitting by discussing the model's complexity and how it relates to the observed performance metrics.
Include additional performance metrics such as the confusion matrix to provide a clearer picture of the model's predictive capabilities.
Address the implications of the model's 85% accuracy in a business context, suggesting minimum acceptable thresholds for practical use.
Consider incorporating external validation data to further assess the model's generalization ability beyond the training and testing sets.
Propose specific methods for improving recall and precision, as these are critical for reducing customer churn effectively.
